news.t: This ETF is beating the S&P 500 — and it's completely different from the index

holdings.infoBox: XMHQ is an equity ETF with a total of 83 individual holdings. The top holdings are TechnipFMC stock at 4.48%, Illumina at 4.35%, Sterling Infrastructure at 4.19%, Twilio at 3.99%, and United Therapeutics at 3.67%.

overview.description: The Invesco S&P MidCap Quality ETF (XMHQ) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the S&P MidCap 400 Quality index. The fund tracks the S&P mid-cap 400 Quality Index, which screens stocks based on fundamental factors and weights them using a multi-factor approach. XMHQ was launched on Dec 1, 2006 and is issued by Invesco.

data.title: This ETF is beating the S&P 500 — and it's completely different from the index
data.text: Every day you can see headlines warning that the stock market is overvalued. These warnings for U.S. investors typically center on the S&P 500.
